ohtani.title: Hicks, Ruiz homer as Marlins take rubber match
ohtani.blurb: Liam Hicks and Esteury Ruiz each hit solo home runs and Javier Sanoja supplies the go-ahead RBI in the Marlins' win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Ohtani, Wrobleski lead Dodgers to a 6-0 win over Cubs
imanaga.blurb: Shohei Ohtani crushes a home run and Justin Wrobleski tosses six scoreless frames, leading the Dodgers to a 6-0 win over the Cubs\n

suzuki.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong hits home run in Cubs' 8-3 win
suzuki.blurb: Pete Crow-Armstrong hits a three-run home run and Edward Cabrera strikes out seven batters in the Cubs' 8-3 win over the Padres

yoshida.title: Trey Yesavage goes 5 1/3 scoreless in season debut
yoshida.blurb: Trey Yesavage starts his 2026 season by going 5 1/3 scoreless in a 3-0 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Jeffers, Buxton hit home runs in Twins' 7-1 victory
okamoto.blurb: Ryan Jeffers and Byron Buxton each hit home runs in the Twins' 7-1 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Colson Montgomery hits a walk-off single in 3-2 win
murakami.blurb: Colson Montgomery hits a walk-off single in the bottom of the 10th as the White Sox sweep the Angels
